homepage.meta.description.message: Open-source workflow orchestrator for z/OS mainframe and modern DevOps

homepage.features.sectionLabel.description: Section label above the features heading

homepage.features.sectionHeading.message: Everything you need for mainframe DevOps
homepage.features.sectionHeading.description: Main heading of the features section

homepage.feature.binary.description.message: A single binary {a4z} orchestrates local tasks (shell, HTTP, filesystem) and z/OS tasks (JCL jobs, datasets, copybooks) in the same workflow YAML — no runtime to install.

homepage.feature.declarative.description.message: YAML syntax inspired by GitHub Actions, adapted for the mainframe. Automatic DAG, {expr} expressions, typed inputs, {needs}, {if_}, {timeout} — fine-grained control of every step.

homepage.feature.tasks.description.message: Shell, HTTP, fs, archive, wait, notify, git, assert, json-query, yaml-query, template, convert, {zosjobs}, {zosdatasets}, {zdeps} — all included, no external dependencies.

homepage.feature.lint.description.message: {lint} validates the YAML and detects cycles. {plan} shows the parallel execution levels. Zero surprises in production.

homepage.feature.security.description.message: Secrets never in the YAML — {secret} variables automatically masked in logs and run artifacts. Zowe profile compatibility.

homepage.feature.crossplatform.descripti.message: Linux, macOS, Windows × amd64 / arm64. Run artifacts stored under {runs}. Automatic rotation. Machine-readable JSON output.
